brief_summary_anonymized: Clean-beauty brand needs to launch in saturated category and avoid trend-of-the-month positioning.
strategic_insight: The brand's contrarian belief: results come from consistent ritual, not from miracle ingredients. The campaign earns trust through honest pacing, not promises.
execution_summary: Brief routine scenes — woman applying product as quiet daily moment. No 'transformation' framing. Voice: calm-reassuring, no hyperbole.
what_made_it_work: Anti-hyperbole voice differentiates in over-promised category
Daily-ritual framing reframes purchase as commitment, not novelty
what_would_NOT_transplant: Wrong fit for impulse-buy / quick-trial categories
Requires brand with willingness to play long-game vs spike-launch
